case_title: JIM HAMMANA VS. GENERAL MOTORS LLC, ET AL

docket_entries.description: ANSWER TO COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 210036905) FILED BY DEFENDANT GENERAL MOTORS LLC

OPPOSITION TO DEFENDANT GENERAL MOTORS LLC'S MOTION TO STRIKE PUNITIVE DAMAGES FROM PLAINTIFF'S COMPLAINT MEMORANDUM OF POINTS AND AUTHORITIES (TRANSACTION ID # 100205927) FILED BY PLAINTIFF HAMMANA, JIM AN INDIVIDUAL
MINI MINUTES FOR JUL-26-2023 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION, 302, RE: DEFENDANT GENERAL MOTORS LLC'S MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS. NO APPEARANCE WAS MADE BY ANY PARTY, COUNSEL, OR INTERESTED PERSON. THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: GENERAL MOTORS LLC'S MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS IS ORDERED OFF CALENDAR FOR NONCOMPLIANCE WITH CCP 439, WHICH REQUIRES THAT THE PARTIES CONDUCT A "MEET AND CONFER IN PERSON OR BY TELEPHONE" BEFORE A MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS IS FILED. PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL IS ORDERED TO MEET AND CONFER IMMEDIATELY AND THE RESPONSE TO THE COMPLAINT IS NOW DUE BY AUGUST 25, 2023.JUDGE: RICHARD B. ULMER JR. CLERK: ROBERT WOODS. NOT REPORTED. (302/RBU)

LAW AND MOTION, 302, RE: DEFENDANT GENERAL MOTORS LLC'S MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT. NO APPEARANCE WAS MADE BY ANY PARTY, COUNSEL, OR INTERESTED PERSON. THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: GENERAL MOTORS LLC'S MOTION TO STRIKE IS ORDERED OFF CALENDAR FOR NONCOMPLIANCE WITH CCP 435.5, WHICH REQUIRES THAT THE PARTIES CONDUCT A "MEET AND CONFER IN PERSON OR BY TELEPHONE" BEFORE A MOTION TO STRIKE IS FILED. PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL IS ORDERED TO MEET AND CONFER IMMEDIATELY AND THE RESPONSE TO THE COMPLAINT IS NOW DUE BY AUGUST 25, 2023. JUDGE: RICHARD B. ULMER JR. CLERK: ROBERT WOODS. NOT REPORTED. (302/RBU)

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-11-2024 Off Calendar

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Aug-01-2024 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Jan-07-25 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-15-2023 Set For Trial On Aug-05-24 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jul-26-2023 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

RE: Defendant GENERAL MOTORS LLC's MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT.

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel, or Interested Person.

The court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: General Motors LLC's motion to strike is ordered off calendar for noncompliance with CCP 435.5, which requires that the parties conduct a "meet and confer in person or by telephone" before a motion to strike is filed. Plaintiff's counsel is ordered to meet and confer immediately and the response to the complaint is now due by August 25, 2023.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr. Clerk: Robert Woods. Not reported. (302/RBU)

MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS
Off Calendar Jul-26-2023 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

RE: Defendant GENERAL MOTORS LLC's MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS.

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel, or Interested Person.

The court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: General Motors LLC's motion for judgment on the pleadings is ordered off calendar for noncompliance with CCP 439, which requires that the parties conduct a "meet and confer in person or by telephone" before a motion for judgment on the pleadings is filed. Plaintiff's counsel is ordered to meet and confer immediately and the response to the complaint is now due by August 25, 2023.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr. Clerk: Robert Woods. Not reported. (302/RBU)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-12-2023 Continued To Sep-13-23 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
